title: Unexpected error when create a `list columns` partition + varbinary + ('') value
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
create table t(a varbinary(255)) partition by list columns (a) (partition p0 values in (''));
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

create table success

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
Error 1105 (HY000): line 1 column 17 near "0x"
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

df9571dd
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a VARBINARY(255), b INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, d VARBINARY(255) DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(c, d) VALUES ('test', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE d IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3(e VARBINARY(255) NOT NULL, f INT DEFAULT 0);
key_bug_features: create table with varbinary partition and empty string value
